name: CRM Exit

current_rules.bias: 1H EMA34 vs EMA50 — 730d seeded, shift(1). EMA34 > EMA50 = BULLISH (longs only). EMA34 < EMA50 = BEARISH (shorts only).
current_rules.entry: 15m candle touches the 1H 34/50 EMA channel (wick or close) AND closes outside in the bias direction. BEARISH: close < min(EMA34,EMA50). BULLISH: close > max(EMA34,EMA50). Requires close to exceed channel edge by at least $0.01.
current_rules.exit: 15m EMA8 crosses EMA21 in the opposite direction of the trade. No other exit condition.
current_rules.session: CST RTH only — 8:30 AM to 3:00 PM. Partial days (< 20 bars) excluded.
current_rules.options: ATM put/call. Strike: nearest $5 increment. Expiry: next Friday >= 2 weeks from entry. IV: HV20. Model: Black-Scholes. r=4.5%.

versions.name: Baseline
versions.entry: 15m close enters the zone between 1H EMA34 and EMA50 (fresh touch)
versions.notes: Established the 1H bias framework. EMA seeding bug found — only 60d used initially, fixed to 730d.

versions.name: Rejection Entry
versions.entry: 15m candle touches channel + closes outside in bias direction
versions.exit: Opposite side close OR 15m EMA34/50 cross
versions.notes: Opposite side close exit introduced. Hurt performance — was stopping out good trades.

versions.name: 8/21 Exit Test
versions.exit: Opposite side close OR 15m EMA8/21 cross
versions.notes: Tested 8/21 as exit but kept opposite side close. Still hurt by the close rule.

versions.name: 5/12 Exit Test
versions.exit: Opposite side close OR 15m EMA5/12 cross
versions.notes: 5/12 too fast — fires on small moves, misses continuation.

versions.name: No Opposite Side Close — 34/50 Exit
versions.notes: Removing opposite side close was the breakthrough. But 34/50 holds too long — theta kills options.

versions.name: No Opposite Side Close — 8/21 Exit
versions.notes: Best overall. Fast enough to beat theta, slow enough to ride real moves.

versions.name: No Opposite Side Close — 5/12 Exit
versions.notes: Too many re-entries. Captures first leg but misses continuation that 8/21 rides.

versions.name: CRM Exit — Locked
versions.entry: 15m touch + close outside in bias direction (close > ch_hi + 0.01 or close < ch_lo - 0.01)
versions.exit: 15m EMA8/21 cross ONLY — no opposite side close
versions.notes: Official locked version. Validated on all MAG7. Added $0.01 buffer to prevent floating point entries at channel edge.

key_insights: Removing the opposite side close exit was the single biggest improvement — win rate jumped from 26% to 65% on TSLA
8/21 exit beats 34/50 (holds too long, theta destroys options) and 5/12 (fires too fast, misses continuation)
730d seeding for 1H EMAs is required to match TradingView values — 60d seeding causes divergence
Thin channels (EMA34/50 width < $0.20) produce consistent noise trades — filter candidate
Options amplify stock moves dramatically: 5%+ stock move = 85-94% option gain at 14-17 DTE
Stock losers become outsized options losers: -3.5% stock = -64% options. Risk management critical.
14-18 DTE at entry is the sweet spot with 8/21 exit timing
open_questions: Apply channel width filter — what threshold maximises PF?
Test on extended data window beyond 60 days
GOOGL is a consistent loser — is it the strategy or the ticker?
MSFT 20% win rate but +390% options — driven by one outlier trade (T15 +552%). Need more data.
